location.title: Location
location.instruction: Choose the location and type of contract below

locationRequired.title: Location Required
locationRequired.description: Please select a service location to continue.

planRequired.title: Plan Selection Required
planRequired.description: Please select a subscription plan to continue.

invalidPlan.title: Invalid Plan Selection
invalidPlan.description: The selected plan is not available for {{location}}.

invalidAddons.title: Invalid Add-on Selection
invalidAddons.description: Some selected add-ons are not available for {{location}}.

priceRequired.title: Price Required
priceRequired.description: Please enter a price for the custom item.

itemNameRequired.title: Item Name Required
itemNameRequired.description: Please enter a name for the custom item.

requiredInfo.title: Required Information Missing
requiredInfo.description: Please complete all required fields for the owner/tenant.

financialManagerRequired.title: Required Information Missing
financialManagerRequired.description: Please provide all required Financial Manager information for professional contracts.

staffRequired.title: Staff Profile Required
staffRequired.description: Unable to create subscription. Please contact administrator.

techServices.title: Tech Services (Optional)
techServices.description: Select technical services and associated costs
techServices.addNote: Add any notes or special instructions...

hardware.title: Hardware (Optional)
hardware.description: Select hardware items and associated costs
hardware.instruction: In this section pick the optional hardware and other services to be paid at inception
hardware.addNote: Add any notes or special instructions...

additionalInfo.title: Additional Information (Optional)
additionalInfo.description: Any other information to include in the contract
additionalInfo.label: Other Information
additionalInfo.note: This information will be included in the contract documentation.

legalPackage.title: Please include the legal package
legalPackage.description: Add comprehensive legal terms and conditions specific to your location and contract type

sepaMandate.title: Add SEPA Mandate
sepaMandate.description: Include a SEPA direct debit mandate with the contract

paymentAuthorization.title: Payment Authorization
paymentAuthorization.ccAuthDescription: Include a Credit Card Authorization form with the contract

signatureOptions.title: Contract Signature
signatureOptions.description: Choose how you would like to complete the contract signature process.

inPerson.title: In-Person Signature
inPerson.description: Complete the signature process immediately with a digital signature pad or touch screen.

sendContract.title: Send Contract
sendContract.description: Send the contract via email using PDFFiller for remote signature completion.

secureRemote.title: Secure Remote Signature
secureRemote.description: Send contract via secure email link for remote signing with verification.

approverFlow.title: eSign with Approver
approverFlow.description: Internal approver reviews contract before sending to customer for signature

confirmDialog.title: Confirm Sender Details
confirmDialog.description: Review and update your sender information before initiating the approval workflow. This information will be used as the document sender and internal approver.
confirmDialog.noteText: You will review the contract via embedded signing before it's sent to the customer.

planSelection.title: Subscription Plans
planSelection.description: Choose your preferred plan and add optional packages to customize your subscription.
planSelection.instruction: In this section you choose the Services that will be billed on a monthly basis

contractDetails.title: Subscription Contract Details
contractDetails.description: Define the contract type and duration

totalScreens.title: Total Screens & Plan Quantity
totalScreens.description: Enter the total number of screens needed
totalScreens.label: Total Screens Needed
totalScreens.notAvailable: Additional screens are not available for {{location}}

basic_us.name: MY SXM
basic_us.description: Perfect for essential services and basic needs

basic_fr.name: MY SXM
basic_fr.description: Idéal pour un bouquet d'entrée de gamme diversifié

full_us.name: ALL MY SXM
full_us.description: Complete access with premium features and priority support

full_fr.name: ALL MY SXM
full_fr.description: Bouquet complet avec toutes les chaines non premium

sbh.name: MY SBH
sbh.description: Bouquet complet avec toutes les chaines non premium

additionalScreens.title: Additional Screens
additionalScreens.description: Screens to add to your base plan(s)
additionalScreens.label: Number of additional screens
additionalScreens.notAvailable: Additional screens are not available for {{location}}.

customItem.title: Custom Optional Item
customItem.description: Add an optional item with custom pricing to the subscription
customItem.namePlaceholder: Enter item name (e.g., VIP Channel Package)
customItem.note: This item will be added to the monthly subscription total.

decoder.title: Decoder Options
decoder.description: Choose how you want to acquire your decoders

rent.title: Rent Decoders
rent.description: Pay a monthly fee for decoder rental

decoder.notAvailable: Decoder purchase is not available for this location. Rental only.

planSelection.addNote: Add any notes or special instructions...
planSelection.addNoteScreens: Add any notes or special instructions for additional screens...

location.title: Service Location
location.description: Select the location where the subscription service will be provided.
location.label: Location

demographics.title: Personal Information
demographics.description: Please provide the required personal information for all parties involved.
demographics.instruction: Please indicate the information related to the relevant contacts
demographics.marketingConsent: I wish to receive information and commercial offers related to other Ideal Group products and services via email
demographics.deliveryNote: To be filled out if they are different from the billing details

signature.title: Contract Signature
signature.description: Choose how you would like to proceed with the contract signature.
signature.inPersonDescription: Complete the signature process in person at our office.
signature.sendContractDescription: Send the contract electronically for remote signature.
signature.secureSignatureDescription: Send contract via email/SMS with two-factor authentication.

customItem.title: Custom Item (Optional)
customItem.description: Add a specific item with an associated cost to this subscription
customItem.itemNamePlaceholder: e.g., Installation fee, Special equipment, Discount, etc.
customItem.itemNameDescription: Enter a descriptive name for the custom item
customItem.priceDescription: Optional amount associated with this item
customItem.namePlaceholder: Enter item name (e.g., VIP Channel Package)
customItem.autoSuggestedDiscountHint: This discount is auto-suggested based on your screen configuration. You can modify it.

planQuantity.label: Number of Plans
planQuantity.autoCalculatedHint: This is automatically calculated based on total screens
